T0132.title: Mule Leads
T0132.definition: The script used to build rapport and lure elderly victims into scams, similar to 'pig feed' in pig-butchering schemes.
T0132.description: The script used to build rapport and lure elderly victims into scams, similar to 'pig feed' in pig-butchering schemes.
T0132.usageExample: 这套马料专门针对糖尿病和高血压的老马，先送免费血糖仪，再讲胰岛修复的假案例，最后逼单卖那个三无胶囊。
